channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead dear on slip road, 20th May
item.description:
Spotted a a dead deer on the slip road coming off at Junction 10 at Cheltenham this morning (20/5/26).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 20th May
item.description:
NWD Give and take footway pothole approx 200x200x50mm tarmac patch to make safe my need a saw to cut off wood sticking up (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 20th May
item.description:
Damaged missing wooden bollard made safe on a nwd with temporary tarmac parch
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree branches back to boundary approx 10 metres x 3 metres footway closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please reset x1 knocked down steel bollard 1000 x200x30mm stats required (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lighting- please install some for pedestrians as it is unsafe., 20th May
item.description:
There is no street lighting along New Road from the junction with Two Hedges Road to Stockwell Lane. This makes it dangerous for pedestrians, particularly in the winter. Cars coming over the small hill here blind you with their headlights, and when it's dark you can't see where you are going. There is street lighting on the side streets so it's probably not an issue with running cables etc.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation approx 20 metres x2 meters footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please reset x1 550x400x40mm gully frame and cover in carriage way stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 20th May
item.description:
Customer reports that National Grid (Ref: HM75214401490L-02) have removed the central bollard at the location and replaced it with tarmac - it appears to be permanent. It's now possible for motorbikes and small vehicles to drive through; bollards closing the road off have been in place for many years. Please can this be investigated as they have safety concerns for pedestrians.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 20th May
item.description:
Please could you clean out the gully as marked on the plan
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please arrange for growth around base of tree to be cut back to safe 3m Standard TM with temp FW closure. (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please replace x1 broken rocking dropped kerb stone 900x100x40mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure 500x400x40mm stats required number 1 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet
